subcodes.first_line: The Luminary of glad-tidings hath verily dawned, inasmuch as the branches have been united with the blessed Lote-Tree, and in remembrance of the Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرق نیر البشاره بما اتصلت الافنان بالسدره المبارکه و فی ذکر الشجره
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
